name: Zucchini-Apple Bulgur
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the water and apple juice to boiling in a saucepan.
2. Add the bulgur and return mixture to boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until liquid is absorbed (about 20 minutes).
4. While bulgur is cooking, sauté the chopped apple and zucchini (peeled or unpeeled) in a separate pan using a bit of apple juice or water until softened.
5. Stir in the salt and cinnamon, then add the cooked bulgur to the vegetables. Mix well and serve.
